title: EMERGENCY VAULT
blurb: A surprise expense pops up — and you've got cash ready! Today you'll build your own emergency vault.
mission: Learn to build a money buffer for surprise costs.
what: An emergency fund is money you save for surprise costs you didn't plan for.
key: A small buffer keeps surprises from hurting.
swapBad: “I'll worry about it when it happens.”
rule: Save a little before you need it.
star: A ready vault turns a crisis into no big deal.
goal: “Save $5 a week until my vault hits $30.”
smartTip: A full vault means no panic when surprises hit!
gbBody: Some kids keep a buffer; others get stuck when surprises hit.
tip: Check your vault once a month.
badWarn: With no buffer, a small surprise becomes a big problem!
goodNote: A little saved makes you ready for anything!

title: SATELLITE NET
blurb: Catch every dollar in your savings net — automatically, every single time!
mission: Learn to save a little money every time you get some.
what: Auto-saving means you save the same amount every time, like a habit.
key: Saving the same bit each time really adds up.
rule: Save the same slice every single time.
star: Small saves done every time beat one big save.
goal: “Save 20% of every dollar, no matter what.”
gbBody: Some kids save by habit; others only save when they remember.
badWarn: If saving is random, your jar stays empty!
goodNote: A steady habit fills your jar without trying hard!

title: SECURITY SHIELD
blurb: Sneaky scammers want your cash — but your shield keeps it safe! Time to defend your money.
mission: Learn to protect your money from scams, fraud, and theft.
what: A scam is a sneaky trick to get your money or secrets unfairly.
key: If it feels off, stop and check first.
swapGood: “A stranger wants my info? No way!”
star: When in doubt, check it out with a grown-up.
goal: “If a message says hurry and wants money, I stop and ask.”
gbBody: Some habits guard your money; others hand it to scammers.
gbKey: A careful kid is a safe kid.
tip: When it feels wrong, walk away.
badWarn: Rushing and sharing secrets lets scammers win!
goodNote: A calm, careful kid keeps every dollar safe!

title: COMPOUND CONSTELLATION
blurb: Watch tiny savings grow into a sky full of money stars — just by being steady!
mission: Learn how steady saving grows bigger over time.
what: Compound growth is when your savings grow, and the growth grows too.
key: Time turns small savings into big ones.
swapGood: “$1 a week becomes $52 in a year!”
star: The earlier you start, the bigger it grows.
goal: “Save just $1 a week and watch it grow all year.”
gbBody: Some kids save steady; others start and stop and miss the growth.
badWarn: Stopping early kills your growth before it starts!
goodNote: Steady saving turns tiny seeds into a money galaxy!

title: DREAMS HARBOR
blurb: Every dream needs a plan — dock your savings here and sail toward what you want!
mission: Learn to connect your savings to a real goal you want.
what: A savings goal is a dream with a price tag and a plan to reach it.
key: A goal gives your saving a reason.
rule: Give your goal a price and a date.
star: A dream with a plan becomes a real prize.
goal: “Save $4 a week for 6 weeks to get my $24 skateboard.”
gbBody: Some kids plan their dreams; others just wish and never get there.
tip: Write your goal where you can see it.
badWarn: A wish with no plan never comes true!
goodNote: A clear plan turns dreams into things you actually get!

title: RESILIENCE ARENA
blurb: Lost some money? It happens to everyone! Learn to bounce back stronger than before.
mission: Learn to recover and bounce back after a money setback.
what: A setback is when money goes wrong — but you can recover from it.
key: Mistakes are lessons, not the end.
swapBad: “I messed up, so I give up.”
swapGood: “I lost $5 — here's how I'll bounce back.”
intro: Turn a slip into a comeback…
goal: “I lost $5, but I'll save $1 a week to build it back.”
smartTip: A setback is just a setup for a comeback!
gbBody: Some kids bounce back from money slips; others just give up.
tip: Treat every mistake as a lesson.
badWarn: Giving up after a slip keeps you stuck!
goodNote: Every bounce-back makes your money muscles stronger!
